patch_applied.description: Added validate_ohlc() private method. Applied OHLC consistency guard to both M1 and M15 candle ingestion paths. Candles where high < max(open,close) or low > min(open,close) are silently rejected with audit trail. Price snapshots are unaffected. Added Test 6 to regression test suite.
patch_applied.regression_protection: test-ea-market-stream.php Test 6 verifies guard fires correctly
